_comment: Claude Desktop / Claude Code MCP configuration examples
_comment_2: Choose ONE of the transport options below
_option_1: === STDIO transport (Claude spawns the MCP server as a child process) ===
_option_1_usage: Default. Each client gets its own MCP process.
_option_2: === HTTP transport (MCP server runs independently, clients connect via URL) ===
_option_2_usage: Start server first: FORGE_MCP_TRANSPORT=http bun run packages/mcp/src/index.ts. Multiple clients share one server.
